message:
refactor(interactive): extract /thinking and /scoped-models into dedicated handler methods

The slash command dispatch in `handle_slash_command()` had two large
inline match arms (~160 lines each) for `/thinking` and `/scoped-models`
that made the function difficult to navigate and reason about. This
refactors them into dedicated methods:

- `handle_slash_thinking(args)`: Manages thinking level display and
  updates, including session header mutation, agent stream options
  update, and session persistence
- `handle_slash_scoped_models(args)`: Handles model scope pattern
  parsing, resolution, persistence to project settings, and
  conversation pane preview rendering

Also changes visibility of `format_extension_ui_prompt` and
`parse_extension_ui_response` from `#[cfg(test)]`-gated imports to
`pub use` exports, making them available for integration tests and
extension UI testing outside the crate's own test harness.

No behavioral changes — pure structural refactor with visibility fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
